name: Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks
summary: arXiv:2607.11875v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. While previous...
description: arXiv:2607.11875v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. While previous works on Transformer learning dynamics have so far been mostly tied to specific tasks, we study a generalized class of inductive tasks that unifies several synthetic tasks known in the literature, in...
author: Tiberiu Musat, Tiago Pimentel, Nicolas Zucchet, Thomas Hofmann
